name: pi-web-access
description_en: Web search, URL fetching, GitHub repo cloning, PDF extraction, YouTube video understanding, and local video analysis for Pi coding agent. Supports OpenAI, Brave, Parallel, Tavily, Exa, Perplexity, and Gemini.
description_zh: Pi 编程代理的网页搜索、URL 获取、GitHub 仓库克隆、PDF 提取、YouTube 视频理解和本地视频分析。支持 OpenAI、Brave、Parallel、Tavily、Exa、Perplexity 和 Gemini。
